name: 2pk Globe Kids' Wall Sconces - Pillowfort™
description: Add a subtle touch of glow to their space with this 2-Pack of Globe Wall Sconces from Pillowfort™. These wall sconces feature integrated LED bulbs and a wooden base for a standout look. Plus, they have 3-way light settings and easily light up with the touch-activated sensor switch. Add them to your kid's bedroom or playroom for gentle illumination.
